nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings

nodes.label: Accuracy and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: I almost always do a bit of my own independent research after getting an answer to fact-check and verify for accuracy

nodes.label: Trustworthiness of AI outputs
nodes.grounding_span: it gives answers which I know for sure are false, but they are presented as absolute fact

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for quick factual answers
nodes.grounding_span: I find myself satisfied with AI when I find an obscure piece of information in seconds

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's confident falsehoods and loops
nodes.grounding_span: I find myself frustrated with AI when I can reiterate and state my question extremely clearly and the AI either gets stuck in a loop giving a wrong answer

nodes.label: Skepticism about AI's current capability for complex tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I am still of the opinion AI isn't all that capable at handling complex tasks just yet

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI improvements for coding and data analysis
nodes.grounding_span: Hopefully going forward the models can advance to the point I can trust them to work out tougher coding-related tasks or in deeper data analysis

nodes.label: Independent verification habit — fact-checks AI outputs
nodes.grounding_span: I almost always do a bit of my own independent research after getting an answer to fact-check and verify for accuracy

nodes.label: Pragmatic task-scoping — limits AI to bounded, verifiable tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to stick to the short and sweet Q&A
